title: Update README and AGENTS.md for multi-agent architecture
description: Why: README and AGENTS.md still describe the old 5-tool single-agent setup. The template now has 15 tools, 5 domain agents + supervisor. These files need to reflect the actual current state to match the pattern of other templates. What: Rewrite README file structure section, tools table, scripts table, add Reachability section from base template. Update AGENTS.md scorer conventions and useful commands.
close_reason: README and AGENTS.md updated to reflect 5 domain agents + supervisor, 15 tools, eval:all, two-turn fixture format, Reachability section.

title: Fix evals: use toolCalls fixtures and remove AIMock tool assertion skip
description: Why: Current fixtures return text-only responses so tool assertions are skipped under AIMock — evals validate nothing about tool routing. Voice template shows the correct pattern: fixtures return toolCalls responses with hasToolResult two-turn flow, and assertions always run. What: Rewrite fixtures/media-processor.json with toolCalls format, rewrite eval.ts to match voice template pattern (no USE_AIMOCK skip on tool assertions), update all 7 datasets.
close_reason: Rewrote eval.ts to remove USE_AIMOCK skip on tool assertions. Created per-domain fixture files (video, audio, media, image, toolkit, supervisor) with two-turn hasToolResult pattern. Updated supervisor dataset messages to avoid fixture collisions. All 7 datasets (26 cases) pass.

title: Fix CI: rename branch to main, run all eval datasets
description: Why: CI triggers on main but repo uses master branch so CI never ran. Also eval job only runs _example.json, not the 6 new domain agent datasets. What: rename master to main, add eval:all script that runs all 7 datasets, update CI eval job to use it.
close_reason: eval:all script added, CI updated, branch renamed to main and pushed

title: Run eval suite on new tools and agents before push
description: Why: 15 new tools and 5 domain agents were added but only typechecked — no smoke tests or evals run against them. Need to verify correctness before pushing. What: Add AIMock fixtures for new tools, run AIMock eval (npm run eval:mock), run live eval if NCA is available, then git init + first commit + push.
close_reason: All 7 eval datasets pass (21 total cases). AIMock fixtures updated, aimock.json changed to directory mode matching CI.

title: Build template-mastra-nca initial template (phases 1-14)
description: Why: Establish a reusable Mastra agent template for NCA Toolkit integrations. What: Fork base template, strip lead-intake assets, add NCA env vars and HTTP client, implement 5 core tools, scorers, mediaProcessor agent, smoke tests, eval gate, AIMock eval, CI workflow, docs, and final verification. All 14 phases complete per SPEC/PROGRESS.md.
close_reason: Completed retroactively — work done without issue tracking

title: Polish NCA template: add MCP + Editor to standard config
description: Why: template-mastra-nca is missing MCP and Editor, which are part of the family standard (REST+A2A+MCP+Studio+Editor). All 7 agents must be registered with MCPServer and each needs a description. What: install @mastra/editor @mastra/mcp, add MCPServer with all 7 agents, add MastraEditor, add editor storage field to MastraCompositeStore, verify typecheck passes, update README/AGENTS.md.
close_reason: All 4 polish steps complete. CI green. REST+A2A+MCP+Studio+Editor now at family standard.

title: Add 15 new NCA tool endpoints
description: Why: Original template only wrapped 5 of 20 NCA API endpoints. All endpoints needed for complete coverage. What: Added tools for trim-video, concatenate-videos, cut-video, split-video, video-thumbnail, concatenate-audio, cut-media, generate-ass, media-metadata, detect-silence, convert-media, convert-to-mp3, screenshot-webpage, image-to-video, get-jobs-status.
close_reason: Completed retroactively — work done without issue tracking

title: Add supervisor + 5 domain subagents (video, audio, media, image, toolkit)
description: Why: Needed agentic layer over all 20 NCA tools, organized by API domain (/v1/video/*, /v1/audio/*, /v1/media/*, /v1/image/*, /v1/toolkit/*). What: Created videoAgent, audioAgent, mediaAgent, imageAgent, toolkitAgent, and mediaSupervisor that delegates by domain. Replaced earlier per-endpoint agent design.
close_reason: Completed retroactively — work done without issue tracking
